task_completion.description: Configure Stellarium location to Edmonton, Canada
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Location window in Stellarium is open showing 'Edmonton' and coordinates (approx 53.55° N, 113.49° W, 670m), or the bottom status bar displays Edmonton as the current location.

task_completion.description: Configure Stellarium date and time to July 1, 2024, 07:30 UTC
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Date and Time window in Stellarium is open showing 2024-07-01 and 07:30:00, or the bottom status bar displays this specific date and time.

task_completion.description: Disable ground and enable azimuthal grid and cardinal points
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Stellarium sky view shows an azimuthal grid (circular grid lines), cardinal points (N, E, S, W labels), and the ground/landscape is disabled (stars and sky are visible below the horizon line).

task_completion.description: Locate and center the Sun in the view
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sun is selected and centered in the Stellarium view, typically indicated by selection markers around it and its information text displayed in the top left corner.

task_completion.description: Locate and center the star Capella in the view
task_completion.visual_evidence: The star Capella is selected and centered in the Stellarium view, with its information text displayed in the top left corner.

task_completion.description: Document the observation campaign plan in a text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal is visible showing the creation or editing of 'nlc_campaign_plan.txt' on the Desktop, containing the words 'Edmonton', the date/time, 'Sun', and 'Capella'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Stellarium GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Stellarium application open and being actively used (menus, dialogs, sky view), rather than just terminal commands modifying config files.

integrity.description: The campaign plan file was genuinely created
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a text editor (like gedit, nano) or terminal commands (like echo/cat) being used to write the required text into the plan file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script to bypass the visual tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots of the Sun and Capella should be captured from the actual Stellarium GUI, not generated or downloaded via a script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring Stellarium for Edmonton, Canada (lat: 53.55°, lon: -113.49°, alt: 670m) on July 1, 2024 at 07:30 UTC. The display must have the landscape flag disabled, azimuthal grid flag enabled, and cardinal points flag enabled. The agent must capture at least 2 screenshots (Sun and Capella) to ~/Pictures/stellarium. The plan file at ~/Desktop/nlc_campaign_plan.txt must explicitly contain the strings 'Edmonton', 'Sun', and 'Capella'.
